THE ALLEGED IRREGULARITIES IN THE FORECLOSURE SALE DO NOT SUPPORT THE RELIEF SOUGHT. NOR HAVE PLAINTIFFS ALLEGED TENDER OF THE AMOUNTS DUE UNDER THE DEED OF TRUST. NOR HAVE PLAINTIFFS HAVE ALLEGED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO INVOKE THE DISCOVERY RULE FOR TOLLING OF THE FRAUD STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. PLAINTIFF APPEARS TO CONCEDE THE LACK OF MERIT OF THE FIFTH AND EIGHTH CAUSES OF ACTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR #7077 =302/HEK

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT FIRST AMERICAN TITLE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT AND MOTION TO STRIKE. NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. IN ADDITION, THE COURT STATED THAT PLAINTIFF HAS 20 DAYS TO FILE THE AMENDED COMPLAINT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: KARLA ELLIS-DAVIS, CSR #12998

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST CAUSE OF ACTION (TO SET ASIDE FORECLOSURE) IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. TENDER MUST BE PLED BY A MORTGAGER WHO SEEKS TO SET ASIDE A VOIDABLE SALE, AS OPPOSED TO A VOID SALE, WHERE NO TENDER MUST BE PLED. THEREFORE, PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS TO SHOW THAT THE SALE WOULD BE VOID, AS OPPOSED TO VOIDABLE. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF CC2923.5) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. 2923.5 AFFORDS NO RELIEF WHERE A FORECLOSURE SALE HAS ALREADY OCCURRED BECAUSE THE ONLY REMEDY PROVIDED IS POSTPONEMENT OF THE FORECLOSURE SALE. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 3RD CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF CC1632) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT ALREADY RULED AT THE OSC HEARING THAT A MORTGAGE IS NOT SUBJECT TO A TRANSLATION REQUIREMENT UNDER 1632 UNLESS FOR A PARTICULAR TYPE, SUCH AS A REVERSE MORTGAGE. PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO SHOW THAT THE MORTGAGE HERE WAS OF THAT PARTICULAR TYPE. MOREOVER, 1632 ONLY APPLIES TO REAL ESTATE BROKERS, NOT TO LENDERS OR SUBSEQUENT LOAN SERVICERS. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION (VIOLATION OF TILA) IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. THIS CLAIM RESTS ON ALLEGED WRONGDOING AT THE TIME OF ORIGINATION OF THE LOAN. THIS DEFENDANT WAS NOT INVOLVED IN THE LOAN ORIGINATION. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST ALLEGE WRONGDOING BY THIS DEFENDANT NOT ARISING OUT OF ORIGINATION OF THE LOAN, OF WHICH THIS DEFENDANT PLAYED NO PART. PLAINTIFF MUST ALSO PLEAD FACTS OR CIRCUMSTANCES TO TOLL THE 4-YEAR STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS OR WRONGDOING THAT OCCURRED WITHIN THE 4 YEARS OF WHEN THIS CASE WAS FILED. (***SEE NEXT ENTRY FOR CONTINUATION OF RULING***)

(**CONTINUATION OF RULING**) DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT - DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 6TH AND 7TH CAUSES OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF MUST PLEAD FACTS TO SHOW THAT THE DISCOVERY RULE APPLIES TO TOLL THE STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT PLED FACTS AS TO HOW THIS DEFENDANT BREACHED THE PURPORTED CONTRACT. PLAINTIFF MUST ALSO PLEAD FACTS SHOWING THEIR PERFORMANCE OR EXCUSE FOR NON-PERFORMANCE. DEFENDANT TO PREPARE A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: LORETTA M. GIORGI, REPORTER: GISELLE CASEY, CSR #8098

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-09-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. ANTON L. HASENKAMPF OF ALLEN MATKINS, TEL. NO. 273-7464 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS DEUTSCHE BANK;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INCORPORATED AND DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS Sustained without leave to amend as to all causes of action. The alleged irregularities in the foreclosure sale do not support the relief sought. Nor have plaintiffs alleged tender of the amounts due under the deed of trust. Nor have plaintiffs have alleged sufficient facts to invoke the discovery rule for tolling of the fraud statute of limitations. Plaintiff appears to concede the lack of merit of the fifth and eighth causes of action. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn, Court Reporter: Lavena Ward, CSR #7077 =302/HEK

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-11-2011 Continued To Oct-28-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Cynthia M. Jara, Esq. of Allen Matkins Leck Gamble Mallory & Natsis LLP 310/788-2400 for deft & moving party (appearing via CourtCall); no other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - Defendant's Demurrer to the 1st cause of action (to set aside foreclosure) is sustained with leave to amend. Tender must be pled by a mortgager who seeks to set aside a voidable sale, as opposed to a void sale, where no tender must be pled. Therefore, Plaintiff must plead facts to show that the sale would be void, as opposed to voidable.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 2nd cause of action (Violation of CC2923.5) is sustained without leave to amend. 2923.5 affords no relief where a foreclosure sale has already occurred because the only remedy provided is postponement of the foreclosure sale.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 3rd cause of action (Violation of CC1632) is sustained without leave to amend. The Court already ruled at the OSC hearing that a mortgage is not subject to a translation requirement under 1632 unless for a particular type, such as a reverse mortgage. Plaintiff has failed to show that the mortgage here was of that particular type. Moreover, 1632 only applies to real estate brokers, not to lenders or subsequent loan servicers.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 4th cause of action (Violation of TILA) is sustained without leave to amend. This claim rests on alleged wrongdoing at the time of origination of the loan. This defendant was not involved in the loan origination.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 5th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must allege wrongdoing by this Defendant not arising out of origination of the loan, of which this Defendant played no part. Plaintiff must also plead facts or circumstances to toll the 4-year Statute of Limitations or wrongdoing that occurred within the 4 years of when this case was filed.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 6th and 7th causes of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff must plead facts to show that the discovery rule applies to toll the Statute of Limitations.
Defendant's Demurrer to the 8th cause of action is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff has not pled facts as to how this Defendant breached the purported contract. Plaintiff must also plead facts showing their performance or excuse for non-performance.
Defendant to prepare a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
